{"step_by_step_thinking": "The HOX genes are known to play a critical role in the development of the limbs and the reproductive tract. Document [7] specifically mentions that mutations in HOXA13 have been linked to hand-foot-genital syndrome, which includes abnormalities in the limbs and the reproductive tract, such as polysyndactyly. None of the other conditions mentioned in the options are directly linked to HOX gene mutations.", "answer_choice": "A"}
